entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Mudflat Mile opens with all legal routes validated.
required_facts: The group must choose a route into the harbor.
Each route has a different known cost or risk.

variants.spooky: Three roads enter the harbor: the patient causeway, the half-buried boats, and the mud that has already begun keeping souvenirs.
variants.grim: Choose the raised causeway, the buried boats, or the direct mudflat. Review the known cost and hazard of each route.
variants.gore_and_dread: The causeway waits above the muck. The boats show their ribs. The mud opens around old footprints and waits for yours.

entries.fallback: Choose one available route into the harbor after reviewing its cost and risk.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Salt Market opens and its item and payment options are public.
required_facts: The group may take an item, pay, search, or leave.
Taking an item without payment may create a Harbor debt.

variants.spooky: The market is open. The merchants are absent, which has never prevented a price from being collected.
variants.grim: Choose whether to take an item, pay the listed cost, search the stalls, or leave. Unpaid goods may create a Harbor debt.
variants.gore_and_dread: The stalls are stocked with dry matches, salt, and bottles holding memories that still twitch. Every price tag is blank on the front.

entries.fallback: Choose a market action. Unpaid items may create a Harbor debt.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Empty Lifeboat is revealed after the Lifeboat Shed interaction commits.
required_facts: The lifeboat is missing required components.
The lifeboat contains one unexplained wet seat.

variants.spooky: The lifeboat is missing an oar, a seal, and any reasonable explanation for the extra wet seat.
variants.grim: The lifeboat requires repairs. One additional seat is wet despite not belonging to the craft.
variants.gore_and_dread: The lifeboat is short an oar and a launch seal. In the extra seat, seawater rises and falls as though something invisible is breathing.

entries.fallback: The lifeboat needs repairs and contains one unexplained wet seat.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Bellhouse counts every active stable seat and then one additional public ring.
required_facts: The bell rang once for each active stable seat.
The bell rang once for the unresolved entry.

variants.spooky: The bell counts every seat. Then it counts one more. The harbor has either made an error or prepared an opening.
variants.grim: The bell rings once for each active seat and once for the unresolved ledger entry.
variants.gore_and_dread: The bell names every seat with a blow that shakes blood from old cracks. The final strike belongs to a place still waiting for a body.

entries.fallback: The bell counted every active seat and one unresolved additional entry.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The older ledger layers are revealed and the record-treatment choice opens.
required_facts: The group must choose how to treat the layered names.
The choice changes later ending eligibility.

variants.spooky: Your names were not written over the dead. They were written where the dead had already written themselves.
variants.grim: Choose whether to preserve every layer, keep only current names, remove current names, or destroy the ledger.
variants.gore_and_dread: Salt peels from the page in strips, uncovering rows of names beneath your own. Some have been crossed out with fingernails.

entries.fallback: Choose how to treat the layered ledger names. Review the displayed ending consequences.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Scratched-Out Door opens with all legal interactions validated.
required_facts: Something is knocking behind the door.
The group may open, speak, defer, or seal the door when legal.

variants.spooky: Something behind the door knows the rhythm of your knock. Whether it learned recently remains unclear.
variants.grim: Choose whether to open the door, speak through it, mark it for later, or seal it if legal.
variants.gore_and_dread: The scratches match the missing names. Behind the door, wet knuckles answer each breath with a patient knock.

entries.fallback: Choose one legal action for the Scratched-Out Door.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: One authorized stable seat receives the first Harbor bargain on a private surface.
required_facts: The offer belongs only to the authorized seat.
The benefit and private cost are displayed before acceptance.

variants.spooky: The Harbor offers a benefit at a private cost. Review both choices before accepting or refusing.
variants.grim: Review the Harbor bargain. The stated benefit and private cost will remain with this stable seat.
variants.gore_and_dread: The Harbor offers survival, knowledge, or time. The price is shown in full, though it may not finish collecting immediately.

entries.fallback: Review the private Harbor bargain and choose Accept or Refuse.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The group commits Restore the Light.
required_facts: Restore the Light is active.
Fuel and lighthouse restoration objectives are active.

variants.spooky: The light will be restored. It may reveal a route home and remind something offshore where home is.
variants.grim: Restore the Light is committed. Complete the fuel and lighthouse objectives.
variants.gore_and_dread: The lens turns seaward. Far beyond the fog, something answers by opening an eye.

entries.fallback: Restore the Light is the active Council plan.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The group commits Extinguish the Light.
required_facts: Extinguish the Light is active.
Alternate navigation and containment objectives are active.

variants.spooky: The light will be extinguished. The harbor may lose its signal, and you may lose yours.
variants.grim: Extinguish the Light is committed. Complete the alternate navigation and containment objectives.
variants.gore_and_dread: The group chooses darkness. The thing offshore does not close its eye; it simply loses the direction of the shore.

entries.fallback: Extinguish the Light is the active Council plan.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The group commits Turn the Light Inland.
required_facts: Turn the Light Inland is active.
The Drowned Archive route and pressure are active.

variants.spooky: The lens turns upon the town. Whatever the harbor concealed will become visible and aware.
variants.grim: Turn the Light Inland is committed. The Drowned Archive route is now active.
variants.gore_and_dread: The beam crosses the drowned streets. Every submerged window opens at once.

entries.fallback: Turn the Light Inland is the active Council plan.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Drowned Archive opens, its collapse state commits, and recoverable objectives are shown.
required_facts: The Archive is collapsing.
The group must prioritize among the available objectives.

variants.spooky: The Archive is collapsing. You may save the truth, the lock, the missing name, or the person trapped beneath them.
variants.grim: Choose which recoverable Archive objective to prioritize. The collapse will continue.
variants.gore_and_dread: Shelves fold inward under the water. Records, chains, and a living hand reach from different aisles while the ceiling gives way.

entries.fallback: Choose an available Archive objective before the collapse advances.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The lifeboat breaks free and its deterministic current route is public.
required_facts: The lifeboat is drifting.
Only the displayed recovery or abandonment options are legal.

variants.spooky: The lifeboat has begun its escape without you. A bold example, if not a particularly useful one.
variants.grim: The lifeboat is drifting. Review the legal recovery or abandonment options.
variants.gore_and_dread: The mooring snaps. The empty boat drifts away while something under its hull climbs aboard.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An additional passenger reaches an escape craft that is at capacity.
required_facts: The craft lacks capacity for every eligible passenger.
The group must use one legal resolution.

variants.spooky: There is room for everyone except one. The lifeboat has simplified the moral arithmetic.
variants.grim: The craft is at capacity. Make room, refuse boarding, investigate the passenger, or use another route.
variants.gore_and_dread: The final passenger grips the gunwale with swollen hands. The boat sinks one careful inch while the group decides whose weight counts.

entries.fallback: The escape craft is at capacity. Choose one legal resolution.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A public item is accepted into a stable seat's inventory.
required_facts: The named seat acquired the named public item.

variants.spooky: {seat} takes {item_name}. The harbor has recognized worse authorities.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat} takes {item_name}. Water trapped inside it shifts toward the new owner's pulse.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A future online session receives a rate-limited join request.
required_facts: A join request is waiting.
No room or seat authority has been granted.

variants.spooky: A guest waits beyond the fog. The host may invite them closer or leave them to the weather.
variants.grim: A join request is waiting. No access or seat authority has been granted.
variants.gore_and_dread: Someone knocks from outside the room. The door remains closed until the host chooses otherwise.

entries.fallback: A join request is waiting for host review.
